Northern Africa

Egypt Travel Guide

Best for travelers focused on antiquities, museums, and a structured city-to-monument route.

Destination guide to Egypt

Egypt delivers some of the world’s most iconic heritage travel, from Cairo and Giza to Nile cities and Red Sea resorts.

Getting around

Cairo is the main gateway, with onward flights, rail, and private touring links to Luxor, Aswan, and the coast.

Best time to visit

October to April is the most comfortable season for long monument days and city walking.

Planning notes

Use this guide to compare what the country does best, how its main attractions connect, where stays and restaurants fit into the route, and which details to verify before committing to a booking.

Dining

Dining ideas that add flavor to the journey

Image slot Restaurant 9 Pyramids Lounge

Cairo & Giza

9 Pyramids Lounge
